HorizontalTransformationScene:
class HorizontalTransformationScene(BaseTransformationScene):
    def setup(self):
        self.plot_length = 3
        super().setup()
    def construct(self):
        self.wait(1)
        self.play(
            self.function_object.animate.shift(RIGHT * 2),
            Transform(
                self.transformation_notation[self.d_index],
                MathTex("-2)")
                .set_color(RED)
                .move_to(self.transformation_notation[self.d_index]),
            ),
            run_time=1.5,
        )
        self.wait(2)
